text.tspan: Binary search: 50 ≤ 50 → left_child of cell[1] = p4
Binary search: 50 ≤ 50 → left_child of cell[1] = p11

p.strong: Every page access goes through fetch_page(page_id):

ol.li: MISS: get_free_frame (free_stack or LRU evict) pread(fd, frame->data, 4096, page_id4096) page_table_insert, lru_push_head pin_count = 1, return data

ul.li: seek(): fetches root, interior, leaf — unpins each after descending (only leaf stays conceptually active)
next() within same leaf: NO fetch needed (data cached)
next() cross-page: unpin old leaf, fetch new leaf
